title: What does this cost?
excerpt: Hi, I’m a developer and my company uses Monday.com.  I’d like to develop an app which will be used only for our company.  Once I’ve developed our app, will it cost me anything to use it?  Does Monday.com charge me anythi…

posts.author: pbergmans (Pieter B)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I’m a developer and my company uses Monday.com. I’d like to develop an app which will be used only for our company. Once I’ve developed our app, will it cost me anything to use it? Does Monday.com charge me anything to “host” an app on their platform?

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml: No. Currently, monday.com doesn’t change any fees for hosting an app on their platform.

posts.author: pbergmans (Pieter B)
posts.cookedHtml: Awesome! What if I make our app publicly available and decide to monetize it…does Monday.com charge me or do any kind of revenue sharing?

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml: At the moment, that is also without cost or revenue sharing.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you @kolaai !

@pbergmans that information is correct. There are no fees at the moment
